markdown_structure_rule: Root README tables and headings must render as separate Markdown lines.
public_sync_rule: Local HEAD, origin/main, README checkpoint, version registry, and tag surface must agree before promotion.
non_claim_lock: Directory, Markdown, and public sync validation are not code correctness.
